summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink PWA completed. All backend APIs (23/23 tests passed) and frontend pages working correctly. Login with email (test@test.com/Test123456) works, Google OAuth button present and redirects correctly. All main pages load: Landing, Login, Register, Feed (with Coming Soon message), Marketplace, Rentals, Services, Games, Wallet, Profile, Earnings Dashboard, Withdraw, Admin Dashboard. Mobile viewport and bottom navigation functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge overlaps Profile link on mobile viewport

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - Returns 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/ - Returns API info
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with valid credentials returns token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user profile with valid token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/listings - Returns listings array
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/categories - Returns 8 categories
Backend: GET /api/rentals/properties - Returns properties array
Backend: GET /api/services - Returns services array
Backend: GET /api/services/categories/list - Returns service categories
Backend: GET /api/wallet/balance - Returns BL coins balance
Backend: GET /api/wallet/transactions - Returns transaction history
Backend: GET /api/referrals/stats - Returns referral code and counts
Backend: GET /api/referral-system/my-network - Returns L1/L2 network data
Backend: GET /api/commissions/my-commissions - Returns commission history
Backend: GET /api/diamond/status - Returns Diamond Leader progress
Backend: GET /api/withdrawals/eligibility - Returns eligibility and ID verification status
Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard - Returns admin stats (36 users)
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics - Returns 30-day analytics
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user with referral code
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with referral_code - Sets referred_by correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/register duplicate email - Returns 400
Frontend: Landing page loads with Login and Get Started buttons
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password inputs and Google OAuth button
Frontend: Login with test@test.com/Test123456 redirects to /feed
Frontend: Register page loads with all form fields and Google signup button
Frontend: Feed page shows Daily Reward claim, Coming Soon message, quick access buttons
Frontend: Marketplace page shows categories and listings
Frontend: Profile page shows user info, BL coins, referral code, Earnings/Withdraw buttons, Admin Dashboard button
Frontend: Wallet page shows balance (10,200 BL), Claim Daily button, transaction history
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard shows Total Earned, Pending, Referral Code, Network Stats, Diamond Leader Status
Frontend: Withdraw page shows Available Balance, ID Verification Required, Verify My Identity button
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Total Users (36), Commissions Paid, Platform Revenue, Diamond Leaders, Recent Users
Frontend: Games page shows Spin Wheel, Scratch Card (Coming Soon), Memory Match (Play)
Frontend: Rentals page shows property listings with filters
Frontend: Services page shows service listings with categories
Frontend: Mobile viewport shows bottom navigation (Home, Market, Games, Wallet, Profile)
critical_code_review_comments: All authentication flows working correctly (email login, Google OAuth button present)
All main pages load without errors
Referral system fully functional with 2-level commission structure
Admin dashboard accessible for admin users
ID verification required for withdrawals (correctly enforced)
Social Feed shows 'Coming Soon' which is expected behavior
Games page shows some games as 'Coming Soon' which is expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly, all features working)

seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (test_reg_*, test_ref_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app testing completed. All features working: Auth (email + Google OAuth), Marketplace, Rentals, Services, Games, Wallet, Profile, Earnings Dashboard, Withdraw, Admin Dashboard. Test user test@test.com is admin with 10,200 BL coins. Social Feed shows 'Coming Soon' (expected). Some games show 'Coming Soon' (expected). Mobile bottom navigation works but has minor overlap issue with Emergent badge.
